query:
-- BACKFILL: Flip inverted RL signs for historical games
-- Logic: when awayModelSpread sign != awayBookSpread sign, flip both
-- awayBookSpread is the authoritative source (book scraper-owned)
-- awayModelSpread should ALWAYS match awayBookSpread sign
UPDATE games
SET 
  awayModelSpread = CASE 
    WHEN CAST(awayBookSpread AS DECIMAL(6,2)) < 0 THEN '-1.5'
    ELSE '1.5'
  END,
  homeModelSpread = CASE 
    WHEN CAST(awayBookSpread AS DECIMAL(6,2)) < 0 THEN '1.5'
    ELSE '-1.5'
  END
WHERE sport = 'MLB'
  AND awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND ROUND(ABS(CAST(awayModelSpread AS DECIMAL(6,2)) - CAST(awayBookSpread AS DECIMAL(6,2))), 2) > 2.9;
command:

-- Logic: when awayModelSpread sign != awayBookSpread sign, flip both
-- awayBookSpread is the authoritative source (book scraper-owned)
-- awayModelSpread should ALWAYS match awayBookSpread sign
UPDATE games
SET 
  awayModelSpread = CASE 
    WHEN CAST(awayBookSpread AS DECIMAL(6,2)) < 0 THEN '-1.5'
    ELSE '1.5'
  END,
  homeModelSpread = CASE 
    WHEN CAST(awayBookSpread AS DECIMAL(6,2)) < 0 THEN '1.5'
    ELSE '-1.5'
  END
WHERE sport = 'MLB'
  AND awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND ROUND(ABS(CAST(awayModelSpread AS DECIMAL(6,2)) - CAST(awayBookSpread AS DECIMAL(6,2))), 2) > 2.9;
